name: Ted Cruz
subject: stop - it's important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Thank you -- let me say it again. Thank you. Heidi and I would not have made it this far without you. | *** DEADLINE: Wisconsin Voting Countdown ***

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34577506:WhHXMZCaN:m:1:1104269936:AD6E00AE76F7E6955F551D58EB4B9F5D:r)
---
Friend,

Thank you -- let me say it again.

Thank you. _Heidi and I would not have made it this far without you._

We've won states from Alaska to Maine -- we can win this nomination and defeat Hillary Clinton.

But today I'm facing an intense battle in Wisconsin -- **a state we must win.**

Here is the good news -- I've just been endorsed by Gov. Scott Walker in Wisconsin, and I've begun to surge in the most recent polls.

But here is the bad news -- I am coming us short. **I need to raise $253k to persuade late deciders and to fund my get out the vote program** \-- and I must raise this BEFORE the Wisconsin primary begins on Tuesday -- in less than 48 hours

[**Can you make an emergency Wisconsin Victory Fund donation of $3?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34577506:WhHXMZCaN:m:1:1104269936:AD6E00AE76F7E6955F551D58EB4B9F5D:r)

I've asked my team to put a clock below to show how little time we have left to make a difference before polling begins:

[ | | WISCONSIN
Voting Countdown
---|---
](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34577506:WhHXMZCaN:m:1:1104269936:AD6E00AE76F7E6955F551D58EB4B9F5D:r) Time is critical, and I hope to hear back from you before midnight.

It's a lot to ask. So, I hope you know me well enough by now to know that I wouldn't be emailing you right now if it weren't really important.

You see: I'm coming under the most intense attacks yet -- since I launched my campaign. They keep getting worse and more desperate. I wouldn't ask you this favor if I wasn't willing to make the same sacrifices.

[**Click here to make an emergency Wisconsin Victory Fund donation of $3.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34577506:WhHXMZCaN:m:1:1104269936:AD6E00AE76F7E6955F551D58EB4B9F5D:r)

Friend, I need you now more than ever.

Thank you and God bless!

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

| PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Katie McGinty
subject: appalling
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8418879049761292288/-1145017115514765312?refcode=e20160403&refcode2=e20160403&amount=25)
---
Friend -- I'm appalled by Donald Trump's comment that "there has to be some form of punishment" for women who choose to exercise their constitutional right to make their own health choices.

I'm appalled, but I can't say I'm surprised. Trump is merely the latest in a long line of anti-choice Republicans who will stop at nothing to block women's access to safe and affordable healthcare.

**And let 's not forget: Pat Toomey supports the same exact vile policies -- and has even said he'd support Trump for president.**

Toomey has said doctors who perform abortions should be jailed. He's voted to defund Planned Parenthood multiple times and has called for the repeal of _Roe v. Wade_.

[**Friend, will you stand with me against Trump and Toomey 's ideological crusade?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8418879049761292288/-1145017115514765312?refcode=e20160403&refcode2=e20160403&amount=25)

It's time -- past time -- to stand up to those who want to degrade women and insert themselves in women's personal, private decisions.

Thank you,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8418879049761292288/-1000901927438909440?refcode=e20160403&refcode2=e20160403&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8418879049761292288/-1217074709552693248).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Jake Sternberger, Team Sestak
subject: D.C. Dems will again re-elect Pat Toomey
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a1d/3476a20e/c749327/2745f574/391537300/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, In 2010, Washington D.C.'s Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) did something it had never done before: it gave a candidate in a contested primary the $1.4 million it had always reserved for the general election. Nevertheless, Sen. Arlen Specter lost to Joe Sestak. The day after the primary, Pat Toomey began spending millions of dollars on TV ads against Joe that went unanswered - unanswered, because the DSCC financing meant to be available for a Democrat in the general election was spent propping up Specter in the primary. Undefended on TV, Joe dropped 18 points in the polls before he raised replacement funds for his own TV ads months later. Dogged, Joe only lost by 2%, **but Pat Toomey became PA 's Senator.** _On Friday, DSCC took the same dangerous action for the 2nd time in its history_ - again, in PA. **With Joe now ahead by 17% against a primary opponent who has no more of her own money to spend** , DSCC placed $450K into this week's TV buy against Joe - the beginning of the full $1.9 million DSCC can do in 2016 - in order to dictate who Pennsylvanians should pick. **Worse, spending the $1.9 million in the primary means it once again won 't be available for the general election - ****and this time****Pat Toomey has $10 million in ready campaign cash for unanswered TV ads the day after the primary.** _The DSCC is handing Pat Toomey his election - once again._ | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a1d/3476a20e/c749327/2745f573/391537300/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0402FBb1&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
---
Dem Party leaders in Washington are taking money that should be used to beat Pat Toomey and instead using it to prop up a candidate trailing by 17% in the polls just because the top Dem Senate leaders will not accept Admiral Joe Sestak's independent thought and people-first approach.
Peter, Joe will win - because he is a leader who people know will serve them and his nation above the power dictates of party bosses. Joe will owe his election to you, the people. Help us keep PA's election determined by the people - not D.C. -[ by contributing the maximum amount you are able: $25, $75, $150, or $500 today!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a1d/3476a20e/c749327/2745f572/391537300/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0402FBp1&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a1d/3476a20e/c749327/2745f571/391537300/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0402FBb2&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
---
Thank you and respectfully,
Jake Sternberger
Campaign Manager

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a1d/3476a20e/c749327/2745f570/391537300/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a1d/3476a20e/c749327/2745f57f/391537300/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a1d/3476a20e/c749327/2745f57e/391537300/VEsB/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a1d/3476a20e/c749327/2745f57d/391537300/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: They want to stop us in Wisconsin
body:
#
Here's the truth, sisters and brothers: **this is probably the most important three week stretch of the campaign**.
In just two days Wisconsin votes, and after winning six of our last seven contests, the outcome there will go a long way toward determining who has the momentum heading into New York's primary.
But more importantly, **there are a lot of delegates at stake on Tuesday, and we are organizing and fighting for each and every one of them.** But so are Hillary Clinton and her backers in the political and financial establishment. They'd love nothing more than to halt our momentum in Wisconsin.
Back when everyone was laughing at us, we were down 40 points in Wisconsin. Now they are desperate to stop us. But if we stand together through Tuesday, we are going to win:
[**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign today and we are going to win Wisconsin. This is the most important three week stretch of the campaign, so there's no more important time to contribute than right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-3-weeks?refcode=em160403s1-full-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-3-weeks?refcode=em160403s1-full-e")
As far as we've come in this campaign and in Wisconsin, it would feel terrible to come up just short on Tuesday night. But you should know that every hour between now and the time the polls close, our supporters are working hard to turn out each every vote. Your contribution goes toward supporting their work, and that's why it's so important you make one today.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-3-weeks?refcode=em160403s1-full-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-3-weeks?refcode=em160403s1-full-e")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: this moment:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2729142771020464128/3971353536154828800?refcode=e20160403.2&refcode2=e20160403.2nd&amount=25)
---
_**Pennsylvania Pre-Primary Deadline: WEDNESDAY**_
[**Make your FIRST donation to Katie 's campaign before our pre-primary filing deadline!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2729142771020464128/3971353536154828800?refcode=e20160403.2&refcode2=e20160403.2nd&amount=25) Friend -- All our work together has led to this moment.

We have just three weeks to turn our campaign's momentum into votes ahead of the April 26th primary. But before that, we have another challenge: **The LAST filing deadline before the primary election is on Wednesday.**

Everyone will be paying close attention to the numbers we post. It's our last chance to show our opponents that grassroots supporters are in for Katie -- and we need 500 NEW donors to chip in before Wednesday to prove it.

[**Friend, become a first-time donor now. Every grassroots donation -- even $5 -- shows that Katie has the support it takes to win on Primary Day.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2729142771020464128/3971353536154828800?refcode=e20160403.2&refcode2=e20160403.2nd&amount=25)

Team Katie

name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: I'll be blunt
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
This is what our wins from six of the last seven contests look like, with our expected delegate totals. I'll be blunt: I very, very much want to add Wisconsin to this list Tuesday night.
Democrats Abroad - 3/21
**Bernie Sanders: 69% (9 delegates)**
Hillary Clinton: 31% (4 delegates)
Idaho - 3/22
**Bernie Sanders: 78% (17 delegates)**
Hillary Clinton: 21% (5 delegates)
Utah - 3/22
**Bernie Sanders: 79% (26 delegates)**
Hillary Clinton: 20% (6 delegates)
Alaska - 3/26
**Bernie Sanders: 82% (13 delegates)**
Hillary Clinton: 18% (3 delegates)
Hawaii - 3/26
**Bernie Sanders: 70% (17 delegates)**
Hillary Clinton: 30% (8 delegates)
Washington - 3/26
**Bernie Sanders: 73% (74 delegates)**
Hillary Clinton: 27% (27 delegates)
[**Make your $3 contribution right now and help ensure that Bernie wins Wisconsin on Tuesday.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-3-weeks?refcode=em160403s2-v3-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-3-weeks?refcode=em160403s2-v3-full")
If we win Wisconsin on Tuesday, we'll have the momentum we need to win New York State and absolutely astound the political establishment. But as good as a win in Wisconsin would be, it would be more devastating to fall just short.
Let's make sure we add Wisconsin to the win column. [**Add your contribution now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-3-weeks?refcode=em160403s2-v3-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-3-weeks?refcode=em160403s2-v3-full")
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). clean_body: Sisters and Brothers - This is what our wins from six of the last seven contests look like, with our expected delegate totals. I'll be blunt: I very, very much want to add Wisconsin to this list Tuesday night. Democrats Abroad - 3/21 Bernie Sanders: 69% (9 delegates) Hillary Clinton: 31% (4 delegates) Idaho - 3/22 Bernie Sanders: 78% (17 delegates) Hillary Clinton: 21% (5 delegates) Utah - 3/22 Bernie Sanders: 79% (26 delegates) Hillary Clinton: 20% (6 delegates) Alaska - 3/26 Bernie Sanders: 82% (13 delegates) Hillary Clinton: 18% (3 delegates) Hawaii - 3/26 Bernie Sanders: 70% (17 delegates) Hillary Clinton: 30% (8 delegates) Washington - 3/26 Bernie Sanders: 73% (74 delegates) Hillary Clinton: 27% (27 delegates) "" If we win Wisconsin on Tuesday, we'll have the momentum we need to win New York State and absolutely astound the political establishment. But as good as a win in Wisconsin would be, it would be more devastating to fall just short. Let's make sure we add Wisconsin to the win column. name: Joe Sestak
subject: $4 million update: D.C. Dems will again re-elect Pat Toomey
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cbef/3157145311/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, I'm resending the email below to make it clear that the DSCC is in effect giving Sen Pat Toomey not $2 million, but $4 million! The $1.9 million the DSCC is now wasting in the primary on my opponent is actually matched by the $1.9 million that the Republican Party also is allowed to give directly to Pat Toomey the day after the primary ... and that $4 million-effect in unanswered TV ads is equivalent to an additional 40% of the $10 million that Sen Toomey already has -- and therefore our Democratic candidate will have zero dollars on April 27 to Toomey's $14 million in unanswered ads. That is why -- with the exception of my two PA primaries -- DSCC has never done such damaging actions. And remember that this $4 million dollar loss is even more disastrous because it is treated as candidate money which purchases TV ads at up to a 40% discounted rate -- as opposed to if the money comes from the DSCC's independent expenditure Super PAC (called Majority PAC) --**which means the $4 million is actually equivalent to the over $5 million it will take the DSCC (and the Democratic primary winner) to raise for TV ad equivalency!** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cbee/3157145311/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0403FBb1&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
---
How damaging -- and it's not just because it is for a candidate that is 17% behind in the polls and unable to now raise money on her own. It's because of what DC actions speak to: a party structure that will absolutely not abide any independence of thought. I never would have believed that the least democratic place I have been is in my Democratic Party (leadership). All just because I once told them "no."
**[Please read the email below and contribute whatever you can now if you haven't already!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cbed/3157145311/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0403FBp1&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cbec/3157145311/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0403FBb2&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
---
Warmly,
Joe
* * *
Peter,
In 2010, Washington D.C.'s Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) did something it had never done before: it gave a candidate in a contested primary the $1.4 million it had always reserved for the general election. Nevertheless, Sen. Arlen Specter lost to Joe Sestak.
The day after the primary, Pat Toomey began spending millions of dollars on TV ads against Joe that went unanswered - unanswered, because the DSCC financing meant to be available for a Democrat in the general election was spent propping up Specter in the primary. Undefended on TV, Joe dropped 18 points in the polls before he raised replacement funds for his own TV ads months later. Dogged, Joe only lost by 2%, **but Pat Toomey became PA 's Senator.**
_On Friday, DSCC took the same dangerous action for the 2nd time in its history_ - again, in PA. **With Joe now ahead by 17% against a primary opponent who has no more of her own money to spend** , DSCC placed $450K into this week's TV buy against Joe - the beginning of the full $1.9 million DSCC can do in 2016 - in order to dictate who Pennsylvanians should pick.
**Worse, spending the $1.9 million in the primary means it once again won 't be available for the general election - ****and this time****Pat Toomey has $10 million in ready campaign cash for unanswered TV ads the day after the primary.** _The DSCC is handing Pat Toomey his election - once again._
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cbeb/3157145311/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0403FBb3&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
---
Dem Party leaders in Washington are taking money that should be used to beat Pat Toomey and instead using it to prop up a candidate trailing by 17% in the polls just because the top Dem Senate leaders will not accept Admiral Joe Sestak's independent thought and people-first approach.
Peter, Joe will win - because he is a leader who people know will serve them and his nation above the power dictates of party bosses. Joe will owe his election to you, the people. Help us keep PA's election determined by the people - not D.C. -[ by contributing the maximum amount you are able: $25, $75, $150, or $500 today!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cbea/3157145311/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0403FBp2&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cbe9/3157145311/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0403FBb4&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
---
Thank you and respectfully,
Jake Sternberger
Campaign Manager

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cbe8/3157145311/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cb97/3157145311/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cb96/3157145311/VEsHBQ/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a14/3476a20e/c7533ef/2745cb95/3157145311/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |
